MSG.NAME: lv_draw_letter: glyph dsc. not found for U+%" PRIX32, letter);#if LV_USE_FONT_PLACEHOLDER/* draw placeholder */lv_area_t glyphCoords;lv_draw_rect_dsc_t rectDsc;lv_coord_t beginX = pos->x + glyphDsc.ofs_x;lv_coord_t beginY = pos->y + glyphDsc.ofs_y;lv_area_set(&glyphCoords, beginX, beginY, beginX + glyphDsc.box_w, beginY + glyphDsc.box_h);lv_draw_rect_dsc_init(&rectDsc);rectDsc.bg_opa = LV_OPA_MIN;rectDsc.outline_opa = LV_OPA_MIN;rectDsc.shadow_opa = LV_OPA_MIN;rectDsc.bg_img_opa = LV_OPA_MIN;rectDsc.border_color = dsc->color;rectDsc.border_width = 1;drawCtx->draw_rect(drawCtx, &rectDsc, &glyphCoords);#endif}return;}if ((glyphDsc.box_h == 0) || (glyphDsc.box_w == 0)) {return;}#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_HW_DRAW_LETTER);#endifRenderGlyphPath(drawCtx, dsc, pos, letter, &glyphDsc);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {pos->x, pos->y, letter};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_HW_DRAW_LETTER, &area);#endif#elseLvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LETTER);#endiflv_draw_sw_letter(drawCtx, dsc, pos, letter);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {pos->x, pos->y, letter};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LETTER, &area);#endif#endif}static void LvDrawLine(struct _lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx, const lv_draw_line_dsc_t* dsc,const lv_point_t* point1, const lv_point_t* point2){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LINE);#endiflv_draw_sw_line(drawCtx, dsc, point1, point2);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {point1->x, point1->y, point2->x, point2->y};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LINE, &area);#endif}static void LvDrawPolygon(lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx, const lv_draw_rect_dsc_t* dsc,const lv_point_t* points, uint16_t pointCnt){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_POLYGON);#endiflv_draw_sw_polygon(drawCtx, dsc, points, pointCnt);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {points->x, points->y, pointCnt, 0};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_POLYGON, &area);#endif}static void LvDrawBufferCopy(lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx,void* dstBuf, lv_coord_t dstStride, const lv_area_t* dstArea,void* srcBuf, lv_coord_t srcStride, const lv_area_t* srcArea){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_BUFCOPY);#endiflv_draw_sw_buffer_copy(drawCtx, dstBuf, dstStride, dstArea, srcBuf, srcStride, srcArea);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_BUFCOPY, dstArea);#endif}static struct _lv_draw_layer_ctx_t* LvDrawLayerCreate(struct _lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx,lv_draw_layer_ctx_t* layerCtx, lv_draw_layer_flags_t flags){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERC);#endifstruct _lv_draw_layer_ctx_t* ret = lv_draw_sw_layer_create(drawCtx, layerCtx, flags);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {flags, 0, 0, 0};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERC, &area);#endifreturn ret;}static void LvDrawLayerAdjust(struct _lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx, struct _lv_draw_layer_ctx_t* layerCtx,lv_draw_layer_flags_t flags){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERA);#endiflv_draw_sw_layer_adjust(drawCtx, layerCtx, flags);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {flags, 0, 0, 0};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERA, &area);#endif}static void LvDrawLayerBlend(struct _lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx, struct _lv_draw_layer_ctx_t* layerCtx,const lv_draw_img_dsc_t* dsc){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERB);#endiflv_draw_sw_layer_blend(drawCtx, layerCtx, dsc);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACElv_area_t area = {dsc->resId, 0, 0, 0};FrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERB, &area);#endif}static void LvDrawLayerDestroy(lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx, lv_draw_layer_ctx_t* layerCtx){BlitPendingImgs();LvSubmitHwDraw(true);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceStart(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERD);#endiflv_draw_sw_layer_destroy(drawCtx, layerCtx);#if LV_USE_DFX_CMD && LV_USE_DFX_TRACEFrameTraceEnd(FRAME_TRACE_SW_DRAW_LAYERD, NULL);#endif}void LvDrawVguCtxInit(struct _lv_disp_drv_t* drv, lv_draw_ctx_t* drawCtx){if (g_vguFuncs == NULL) {LV_LOGE("[%s: %d] module is not inited. @lv_draw_vgu.c(895),ERROR
